name: strix-mesh-ops
description: Diagnostics + autonomy for the A2A mesh / local-inference stack: the mesh-doctor & recon agents, the /mesh-health, /system-recon, /strix-facts and /autonomy skills, and the bundled mesh-health-probe. Turns a fifteen-turn investigation into one call, and encodes decide-and-proceed so you stop asking about reversible choices. Opt-in (host-specific).
